mapper.select: SELECT MBL_BNKING_TYPE TYPE ,MBL_BNKING_VSN VSN ,MBL_BNKING_REGIST_DT REGDT ,MBL_BNKING_REGIST_TM REGTM FROM UIDBS01.SMTPHONE_BNKING_VSN_MGT WHERE MBL_BNKING_TYPE = #{mblBankingType} ORDER BY MBL_BNKING_REGIST_DT DESC , MBL_BNKING_REGIST_TM DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY WITH UR

SELECT A.PRDCT_CD, A.PRDCT_NM, A.PRDCT_EXPLN_ATTCHD_FILE_1 AS PRDCT_EXPLN_DOC_1, A.PRDCT_EXPLN_ATTCHD_FILE_2 AS PRDCT_EXPLN_DOC_2, A.PRDCT_EXPLN_ATTCHD_FILE_3 AS PRDCT_EXPLN_DOC_3 FROM SPCFC_MONEY_TRUST_ISA_PRDCT A WHERE 1=1 OR A.PRDCT_CD = #{trustCd} FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY WITH UR

SELECT A.PRDCT_CD, A.PRDCT_NM, A.PRDCT_EXPLN_ATTCHD_FILE_1 AS PRDCT_EXPLN_DOC_1, A.PRDCT_EXPLN_ATTCHD_FILE_2 AS PRDCT_EXPLN_DOC_2, A.PRDCT_EXPLN_ATTCHD_FILE_3 AS PRDCT_EXPLN_DOC_3 FROM SPCFC_MONEY_TRUST_ISA_PRDCT A WHERE A.PRDCT_CD = #{trustCd} WITH UR
